Name.jp: シャドウビースト・バイト

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff</color> from the target.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 해제합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率解除目标的<color=#28d9ed>1个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en:
(Passive Effect)
<color=#ffd732>Upon death, grants [Buff_V_common_monster_passive_AP] Action Points and 4 Chain Points for each enemy.</color>

Increases <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> at the start of battle. Greatly increases the damage dealt if the target is inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Poisoned</color> or <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color>.
description.kr:
(패시브 효과)
<color=#ffd732>사망 시 적 한 명당 AP [Buff_V_common_monster_passive_AP], CP 4 씩 회복시킵니다.</color>

전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중</color>이 증가합니다. 또한 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>중독</color>, <color=#28d9ed>화상</color> 상태라면 입히는 피해가 증가합니다.
description.jp:
(パッシブ効果)
<color=#ffd732>倒れた時、敵全体にAPを[Buff_V_common_monster_passive_AP]、CPを4獲得させる。</color>

戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>効果命中</color>が<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPする。対象が<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>、<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>状態の場合、与えるダメージがUPする。
description.zh:
(被动效果)
<color=#ffd732>死亡时,使每个敌人的AP恢复[Buff_V_common_monster_passive_AP]、CP恢复4。</color>

战斗开始时,使<color=#28d9ed>效果命中</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>、<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>状态,则伤害提升。
